latin: Ne eas placide in illam noctem bonam. senex seni poeta haec verba legit. contra mortem pugna, contra tenebras clama. ne eas placide.

questions.prompt: What is the speaker urging someone not to do?
questions.target: Go gently into that good night
choices: Go gently into that good night

questions.prompt: What should one do against death and darkness?

translation: Do not go gentle into that good night. The old man read these words of an old poet. Fight against death, rage against the darkness. Do not go gentle.
